summary.lv: Discover Cars meklē vecāko UX/UI dizaineri/-i, kurš/-a vadīs produkta dizainu, cels vizuālo līmeni un veidos mērogojamas dizaina sistēmas globālai auto nomas platformai.
summary.en: Discover Cars is looking for a Senior UX/UI Designer to own product design across areas, raise the visual bar, and build scalable design systems for a global car rental marketplace.
